translations.en: You’re keeping up with your treatment.
translations.de: Du hältst dich gut an deine Behandlung.
translations.yue: 你一直有好好跟住療程。
translations.pt: Você está seguindo bem o tratamento.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tuân thủ điều trị tốt.
translations.hi: आप उपचार का अच्छे से पालन कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 治療をきちんと続けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; refers to the addressee.
Main verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular) agreeing with ‘Tu’; expresses the action of following.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb ‘suis’ to indicate the quality/degree of the action.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, masculine singular); determiners the noun ‘traitement’.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of ‘suis’ within the NP ‘ton traitement’.

sentences.target: J'oublie souvent mon traitement le soir.

translations.fr: J'oublie souvent mon traitement le soir.
translations.en: I often forget my treatment in the evening.
translations.es: A menudo olvido mi tratamiento por la noche.
translations.de: Ich vergesse abends oft meine Behandlung.
translations.it: La sera mi dimentico spesso la terapia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我晚上经常忘记进行治疗。
translations.yue: 我夜晚成日唔記得做治療。
translations.ru: Я часто забываю про лечение вечером.
translations.pt: Eu frequentemente esqueço meu tratamento à noite.
translations.he: אני לעיתים קרובות שוכח את הטיפול בערב.
translations.vi: Tôi thường quên điều trị vào buổi tối.
translations.ar: أنا كثيرًا ما أنسى علاجي مساءً.
translations.nl: Ik vergeet 's avonds vaak mijn behandeling.
translations.uk: Я часто забуваю про лікування ввечері.
translations.hi: मैं शाम को अक्सर अपना उपचार भूल जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Το βράδυ συχνά ξεχνάω τη θεραπεία μου.
translations.nb: Om kvelden glemmer jeg ofte behandlingen min.
translations.id: Saya sering lupa menjalani pengobatan pada malam hari.
translations.sv: På kvällen glömmer jag ofta min behandling.
translations.da: Om aftenen glemmer jeg ofte min behandling.
translations.ja: 夜はよく治療を忘れてしまいます。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); agrees with the subject ‘J’’.
Frequency adverb; modifies ‘oublie’ to indicate habitual occurrence.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, masculine singular); determiners the noun ‘traitement’.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of ‘oublie’.
Definite article (masculine singular); determiners ‘soir’ in the temporal NP ‘le soir’.
Common noun (masculine singular); temporal complement (‘le soir’ = in the evening).

translations.es: El tratamiento empieza mañana por la mañana.
translations.zh-Hans: 治疗将于明天早上开始。
translations.pt: O tratamento começa amanhã de manhã.
translations.vi: Điều trị bắt đầu vào sáng mai.
translations.hi: उपचार कल सुबह शुरू होता है.
translations.el: Η θεραπεία ξεκινάει αύριο το πρωί.
translations.ja: 治療は明日の朝から始ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular); marks ‘traitement’ as definite.
Common noun (masculine singular); subject of the verb ‘commence’.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); states the start of the subject.
Temporal adverb; indicates the day of the action.
Common noun (masculine singular); part of the time expression ‘demain matin’.

sentences.target: On doit arrêter le traitement cet été.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa aʁete lə tʁɛtmɑ̃ sɛt ete/

translations.fr: On doit arrêter le traitement cet été.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa aʁete lə tʁɛtmɑ̃ sɛt ete/
translations.en: We have to stop the treatment this summer.
translations.es: Tenemos que suspender el tratamiento este verano.
translations.de: Wir müssen die Behandlung diesen Sommer absetzen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们必须在今年夏天停止治疗。
translations.yue: 我哋今年夏天要停止療程。
translations.ru: Нам нужно прекратить лечение этим летом.
translations.pt: Precisamos interromper o tratamento neste verão.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להפסיק את הטיפול בקיץ הזה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải ngừng điều trị vào mùa hè này.
translations.nl: We moeten de behandeling deze zomer stopzetten.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно зупинити лікування цього літа.
translations.hu: Nyáron abba kell hagynunk a kezelést.
translations.hi: हमें इस गर्मी में उपचार बंद करना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να σταματήσουμε τη θεραπεία αυτό το καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Vi må stoppe behandlingen denne sommeren.
translations.id: Kita harus menghentikan pengobatan musim panas ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste avbryta behandlingen i sommar.
translations.ro: Trebuie să oprim tratamentul vara aceasta.
translations.da: Vi skal stoppe behandlingen til sommer.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy lopettaa hoito tänä kesänä.
translations.ja: この夏は治療を中止しなければなります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun often used colloquially for ‘we’; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person singular); selects the infinitive ‘arrêter’.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal ‘doit’ and takes ‘le traitement’ as its object.
Definite article (masculine singular); determiners ‘traitement’.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of ‘arrêter’.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular form used before vowel-initial nouns); determiners ‘été’.
Common noun (masculine singular); temporal complement (‘cet été’ = this summer).

On doit arrêter le traitement cet été.

fr: J'oublie souvent mon traitement le soir.
On doit arrêter le traitement cet été.

en: You’re keeping up with your treatment.
I often forget my treatment in the evening.
We have to stop the treatment this summer.
